case_title: BIMAL GAUTAM VS. GOLDEN STATE PARKING INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BIMAL GAUTAM. DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE PARKING INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAUTAM, BIMAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE PARKING INC. $10,650.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR ERKAN CAKIR FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE PARKING INC.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY SET FOR AUG-14-2025 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-22-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT WILL PAY PLAINTIFF $5000.00 TODAY 8/14/25. HE WILL WIRE THE MONEY TO HIM. DEFENDANT WILL PAY PLAINTIFF THE 2ND FINAL PAYMENT OF $4,500.00 ON 9/14/25. IF THE PARTIES DO NOT RETURN ON THAT DAY THE JUDGMENT WILL BE VACATED & THE COMPLAINT WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BIMAL GAUTAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE PARKING INC. (ERKAN CAKIR) IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2025 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAUTAM, BIMAL AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE PARKING INC.
REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-22-2025 IN DEPT. 506 - DISMISSAL ON FILE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50.(WAIVED) SERVED DEC-16-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE PARKING INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $306.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE PARKING INC.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE PARKING INC. HEARING SET FOR AUG-14-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM MOTION OF SEP-22-2025 AT 1:30 PM. BY JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BIMAL GAUTAM IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE PARKING INC. IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,499.00 FILED BY GAUTAM, BIMAL AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE PARKING INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAUTAM, BIMAL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ERKAN CAKIR FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE PARKING INC.
ORDER FOR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
